title: Deadfast PTO0010P Concentrated Weed Killer Sachets, 12 x 100 ml,Black
features: Action kills both above and below the ground
sometimes it can take longer to take affect depending on the species of the plant
description: From the manufacturer Deadfast Weedkiller Concentrate Deadfast Weedkiller will kill most living plant tissue on paths, drives and wasteland. It can be applied straight from the sachet to clear well established woody weeds and trees, or diluted down to eradicate large areas of weeds and plants. The active ingredient works through systemic action as it is carried throughout the plant by the sap. After absorption through foliage or cut stumps, the Ammonium Salt of Glyphosate is carried to the outer extremities of the plant’s root system where it begins to work. Effects should be visible in 7-14 days. Deadfast Weedkiller is a total herbicide and as such care should be taken that it does not come into contact with wanted plants. After use ensure that garden sprayers or other vessels used for application are thoroughly cleaned, as traces of product left in equipment can damage or destroy plants sprayed later. Product Features Kills the weed and its roots Concentrated weedkiller for use neat or diluted depending on the type of weed Contains Glyphosate How to Use Spray Application Cut the corner off the sachet and pour the contents (100ml) into the application vessel and then add clean water to make 1 full litre of product Spray lightly, or pour gently, over leaves until they are thoroughly wet but take care to avoid run off For best results apply when weeds are actively growing Effects can be seen in a few days but full control can take up to 4 weeks If it rains within 6 hours of application then effectiveness can be reduced and re-application is advised Apply this product carefully. Ensure spraying takes place only when weeds are actively growing (normally March to October) and is confined only to visible weeds including those in the 30cm swath covering the kerb edge and road gulley – do not overspray drains Direct Application To eradicate woody and well-established weeds first cut back the plant so that the exposed stem or trunk is near ground level Apply Deadfast Weeedkiller within 4 days of cutting back the plant Cut the corner off the sachet and pour the contents directly onto exposed wood or plant stem. Ensure an even coating is applied but take care to avoid wanted plants

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always wear protective clothing, gloves, and eye/face protection when handling. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not apply in windy conditions. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. In case of accidental contact, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical advice. Do not use on edible crops. Dispose of contents/container in accordance with local regulations.
